field.filter: SELECT PowerConnection WHERE id != :this->id AND location_id = :this->location_id
SELECT AirConditioningCompressor WHERE id != :this->id AND location_id = :this->location_id
SELECT PowerConnection WHERE id != :this->id AND location_id = :this->location_id
SELECT ChilledWaterCircuit WHERE id != :this->id AND location_id = :this->location_id

neighbour.query_down: SELECT ChilledWaterCabinet WHERE chilledwatercircuitA_id = :this->id OR chilledwatercircuitB_id = :this->id
neighbour.query_up: SELECT ChilledWaterCircuit WHERE id = :this->chilledwatercircuitA_id OR id = :this->chilledwatercircuitB_id

field.filter: SELECT ChilledWaterCircuit WHERE id != :this->id AND location_id = :this->location_id

neighbour.query_down: SELECT ChilledWaterCabinet WHERE chilledwatercircuitA_id = :this->id OR chilledwatercircuitB_id = :this->id
neighbour.query_up: SELECT ChilledWaterCircuit WHERE id = :this->chilledwatercircuitA_id OR id = :this->chilledwatercircuitB_id
